generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control System (BCS) for adaptive lighting control, modeled directly in BIM environment with bidirectional communication via Eclipse Ditto middleware. Enables real-time adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for HVAC systems, integrated with BIM for runtime control logic. Supports automated setpoint adjustments and energy optimization through Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
]

instance ShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated shading system actuator configured within BIM environment, enabling real-time control of solar heat gain reduction. Communicates with Ditto for policy-based operation."
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central Building Control System controller coordinating multiple actuators (lighting, HVAC, shading) with real-time decision-making capabilities. Integrated with Ditto for automated commissioning and runtime control."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based occupancy sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time occupancy patterns. Embedded in BIM with metadata (tenantID, deviceID) for Ditto integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor providing real-time thermal data for HVAC optimization. Integrated with BIM and Eclipse Hono for continuous data transmission."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting level sensor measuring ambient illumination for adaptive lighting control. Part of BIM-embedded device modeling with Ditto configuration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption monitor capturing real-time energy usage metrics. Synchronized with Ditto for operational analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor providing environmental data for indoor air quality monitoring. Embedded in BIM with Ditto integration for runtime control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic foundation BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components. Serves as the core representation for device modeling and control logic configuration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEnabler, BIMToolEnabler
]

instance RuntimeDeviceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extracted BIM-based runtime device model containing sensor/actuator configurations, control logic, and middleware metadata (tenantID, deviceID). Deployed via Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, EclipseHonoEnabler
]

instance ControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Declarative configuration model storing reinforcement learning-based control strategies (e.g., adaptive lighting policies). Integrated with Ditto for runtime execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5-based visualization model enabling interactive 3D monitoring and simulation of building systems. Renders real-time operational data for immersive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineEnabler, VisualAnalyticsService
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns data ingested via Eclipse Hono and processed by Ditto for synchronization with BIM-based device models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated environmental data (temperature, humidity, light levels) processed through Hono middleware for building system optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics processed by Ditto for operational analytics and policy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scalable IoT middleware enabling real-time data ingestion from physical sensors and device management. Acts as the primary interface between physical components and Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DeviceManagementService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented platform facilitating bidirectional communication, runtime configuration, and modular service integration between physical and digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlPolicyExecutionService, AdaptiveLightingService, HVACOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity visualization engine enabling immersive 3D monitoring, simulation, and user interaction with the digital twin representation."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualAnalyticsService, InteractiveSimulationService
]

instance ModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering toolset automating BIM-to-DT artifact transformations via model-to-model and model-to-text processes."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService, RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance BIMToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools (Revit/ArchiCAD) enabling device modeling and initial configuration of physical components within the semantic foundation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceModelingService, ConfigurationValidationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AI-driven optimization platform implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive control policy generation and refinement."
    DTDFVocab:enables PolicyOptimizationService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing continuous real-time monitoring of building operational metrics through Ditto and visualization in Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMetricsInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control policies with real-time adjustment capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationInsight, LightingOptimizationAction, OccupancyBasedControlAction
]

instance HVACOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing HVAC system performance through real-time data processing and policy execution via Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight, ComfortOptimizationAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing sensor data anomalies to predict equipment failures and recommend maintenance actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertInsight, FailurePredictionAction
]

instance VisualAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling interactive 3D visualization of building performance metrics through Unreal Engine 5 interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DHeatmapInsight, PerformanceTrendInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OperationalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational metrics including energy consumption, occupancy trends, and equipment health status for facility management."
]

instance LightingOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized lighting schedules and energy savings recommendations based on occupancy patterns and reinforcement learning models."
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified energy savings potential through optimized HVAC and lighting control policies derived from operational data."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts generated from sensor data anomalies indicating potential equipment failures."
]

instance 3DHeatmapInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D heatmaps visualizing energy usage patterns and environmental conditions within the building."
]

instance PerformanceTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance trend analysis showing building system efficiency improvements over time."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting levels based on occupancy and environmental conditions using reinforcement learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OccupancyBasedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of building systems based on real-time occupancy data processed through Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC setpoint adjustments to optimize thermal comfort while minimizing energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FailurePredictionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of maintenance recommendations based on predictive analytics from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment/Component Structure
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all integrated sensing, acting, and control components."
    base:contains BCSZone, LightingZone, HVACZone
]

instance BCSZone : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control System zone containing centralized controllers and distributed actuators for system-wide coordination."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingEnvironment
]

instance LightingZone : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lighting control zone containing sensors, actuators, and policy models for adaptive lighting systems."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingEnvironment
]

instance HVACZone : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "HVAC control zone containing environmental sensors, actuators, and optimization policies for thermal management."
    base:isContainedIn BuildingEnvironment
]

// Additional required instances for services
instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device lifecycle including registration, configuration, and status monitoring."
]

instance ControlPolicyExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing control policies defined in the ControlPolicyModel."
]

instance InteractiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling interactive simulation of building systems within the visualization environment."
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating BIM models against DT requirements and middleware specifications."
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts from BIM models for deployment in Ditto/Hono."
]

instance DeviceModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service modeling physical devices within BIM environment with metadata and control logic."
]

instance ConfigurationValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating device configurations against system requirements."
]

instance PolicyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing control policies using reinforcement learning algorithms."
]

instance AnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing analytics capabilities for data processing and insight generation."
]

instance HVACControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing specialized control capabilities for HVAC systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables HVACOptimizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved through **bidirectional control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical infrastructure via **Eclipse Ditto’s service-oriented architecture**. The DT processes **runtime data** (e.g., occupancy patterns, energy consumption trends) to **adjust control policies** (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC optimization) and sends **actuation commands** to physical actuators. This interaction is **automated and standardized**, leveraging **model-driven transformations** to generate **deployable runtime interfaces** for seamless integration with the BCS."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and event-driven**, with synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control commands). The DT supports **continuous monitoring** of building operations, enabling **sub-second latency** for **adaptive control responses** (e.g., lighting adjustments based on occupancy). Additionally, the system incorporates **batch processing** for **historical data analysis** and **long-term trend forecasting**, operating on **hourly to daily time scales** for performance optimization and energy management."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, middleware-driven architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Model**: The **semantic backbone**, enriched with **device metadata** and **control logic**.
   - **Eclipse Hono**: Acts as the **data ingestion layer**, handling **sensor data acquisition** and **device registration**.
   - **Eclipse Ditto**: Serves as the **runtime management layer**, enabling **bidirectional communication**, **service orchestration**, and **modular extensibility**.
   - **Unreal Engine 5**: Provides the **visualization layer**, enabling **interactive 3D monitoring** and **user interaction**.
   - **Custom Services**: Integrated via **standardized extension points** for **domain-specific analytics** (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance).
   The constellation ensures **scalability**, **interoperability**, and **real-time synchronization** between physical and digital representations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During the **design phase**, the DT leverages **BIM models** for **clash detection, performance simulation, and documentation**. In the **construction phase**, it supports **automated commissioning** of BCS components. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** (e.g., energy optimization via reinforcement learning). The framework also facilitates **post-occupancy evaluation**, allowing **iterative refinement** of control policies based on runtime feedback."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment between physical and digital representations** by measuring **data consistency, synchronization latency, and control accuracy**.
   - **Model validation techniques**: Ensure **semantic correctness** of BIM-enriched models before deployment.
   - **Runtime synchronization checks**: Continuously verify **data integrity** between physical sensors and virtual models.
   - **Uncertainty modeling**: Accounts for **sensor noise, communication delays, and control policy drift** in adaptive systems (e.g., reinforcement learning-based lighting control).
   - **Verification and validation (V&V) mechanisms**: Include **post-deployment audits** to assess **DT performance** and **operational impact** (e.g., energy savings, comfort improvements)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time, bidirectional communication** between physical and virtual systems. The technical connection is established via:
   - **HTTP/REST or MQTT protocols** for **sensor data ingestion** and **control command transmission**.
   - **Eclipse Hono’s device management API** for **secure device registration** and **authentication**.
   - **Eclipse Ditto’s service-oriented architecture** for **runtime configuration** and **service orchestration**.
   - **Standardized middleware interfaces** ensuring **interoperability** with **IoT platforms, BCS, and third-party services**.
   The system supports **low-latency (<100ms) synchronization** for critical control operations and **batch processing** for historical data analysis."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is **hosted in a cloud or on-premise environment**, with **Eclipse Ditto and Hono** deployed as **containerized microservices** (e.g., via Kubernetes or Docker). The **Unreal Engine 5 visualization layer** is hosted on **dedicated servers** or **edge devices** for **low-latency rendering**. The framework supports:
   - **Modular deployment** of **sub-twins** (e.g., zone-specific services) for **scalability**.
   - **Runtime reconfiguration** without downtime, enabling **adaptive deployment** of new services.
   - **Security-hardened environments** with **role-based access control (RBAC)** and **data encryption** for **privacy and safety**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
   - **External IoT platforms** (e.g., AWS IoT, Azure IoT) via **standardized middleware APIs** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
   - **Building Management Systems (BMS)** for **legacy system compatibility**.
   - **Third-party analytics tools** (e.g., energy management software, AI-driven optimization platforms) via **RESTful APIs**.
   - **Other Digital Twins** in a **federated architecture**, enabling **cross-building data sharing** for **urban-scale analytics**.
   The framework supports **interoperability standards** (e.g., **OPC UA, JSON-LD**) for **seamless data exchange** with heterogeneous systems."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared between the building owner and DT service providers**, with **clear contractual agreements** defining **access rights** and **usage policies**. The framework incorporates:
   - **Role-based access control (RBAC)** to restrict **sensitive data** (e.g., occupancy patterns, energy consumption) to authorized stakeholders.
   - **Data anonymization techniques** for **privacy-preserving analytics**.
   - **GDPR-compliant data handling** for **user consent and opt-out mechanisms**.
   The system ensures **data sovereignty** by allowing **on-premise deployment** for **sensitive infrastructure** (e.g., military or healthcare buildings)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM standards** (e.g., **IFC, COBie**) for **semantic consistency** in building data representation.
   - **IoT standards** (e.g., **OPC UA, MQTT**) for **interoperable communication** between physical and digital systems.
   - **Middleware standards** (e.g., **Eclipse Ditto’s Thing Model API**) for **runtime configuration** and **service orchestration**.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) standards** (e.g., **MOF, QVT**) for **automated model transformations**.
   - **Security standards** (e.g., **ISO/IEC 27001**) for **data protection** and **cybersecurity compliance**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT incorporates **multi-layered security and safety mechanisms**:
   - **Authentication and Authorization**: **OAuth 2.0/JWT-based access control** for **secure middleware interactions**.
   - **Data Encryption**: **TLS 1.3** for **end-to-end communication** between physical sensors and DT components.
   - **Isolation and Sandboxing**: **Containerized deployment** (e.g., Kubernetes) to **prevent lateral movement** of cyber threats.
   - **Fail-Safe Controls**: **Redundant control pathways** and **emergency shutdown protocols** to **prevent accidents** in critical systems (e.g., fire suppression, life safety).
   - **Compliance Audits**: **Regular penetration testing** and **security certifications** (e.g., **ISO 27001**) to ensure **operational safety**.
   The system is designed to **prevent remote exploitation** of physical assets, with **local fallback mechanisms** for **critical operations**."
]
